title: Journal tag taxonomy
description: Overrides-only controlled vocabulary for journal tags. The effective canonical tag set is computed from tag frequency; this file holds only what frequency cannot infer (aliases, facet membership, thresholds, and the ticket-key pattern).

threshold.description: Minimum occurrence count before an unfaceted tag is flagged by lint.

aliases.description: Map of non-canonical tag spellings onto their canonical form (e.g. "teams": "ms-teams").

facets.description: Named groups of canonical tags (e.g. type, tech, topic). A tag that appears in no facet above the threshold is flagged.

pin.description: Tags kept in the canonical set regardless of frequency.

suppress.description: Tags excluded from the canonical set and from lint flagging.

ticketPattern.description: Regular expression identifying issue-tracker key tags, which are exempt from unfaceted flagging.
